title: Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kaluveli Bird Sanctuary, sometimes spelled Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary, is a protected area and bird sanctuary located in Villupuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Kaluveli Bird Sanctuary, sometimes spelled Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary, is a protected area and bird sanctuary located in Villupuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kaliveli Lake
topPlaces.description: Kaliveli Lake (Kaliveli Lagoon) or Kazhuveli wetland, is a coastal lake and lagoon with wetlands in the Viluppuram District of Tamil Nadu state, in eastern South India. It is the home of Kaliveli Bird Sanctuary.

topPlaces.name: Kaluveli
topPlaces.description: Kaluveli, also spelled Kazhuveli, is the second largest brackish water lake in South India located in Tindivanam taluk of Villupuram district of the state of Tamil Nadu. It is about 18 km north of Pondicherry.

topPlaces.name: Ganapathichettikulam
topPlaces.description: Ganapathichettikulam is a fishing hamlet, along with Periyakalapet, Chinnakalapet and Pillaichavad, next to Kalapet near Pondicherry on the south eastern coast of India. It is a ward in the municipality of Oulgaret.

topPlaces.name: Kalapet
topPlaces.description: Kalapet, or Kalapettai, is a town and enclave in the Union territory of Puducherry, India. It was annexed by the French in 1703 and has been a part of the Union territory ever since.

topPlaces.name: Murukeri
topPlaces.description: Murukeri is located in Viluppuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is a small village in Tindivanam town, but a famous one around neighbouring villages.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Puducherry
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Puducherry or locally known as JNV Kalapet is a boarding, co-educational school in Puducherry district of Puducherry U.T. in India. Navodaya Vidyalayas are funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development and administered by Navodaya Vidyalaya Smiti, an autonomous body under the ministry.

items.note: Kaliveli Lake (Kaliveli Lagoon) or Kazhuveli wetland, is a coastal lake and lagoon with wetlands in the Viluppuram District of Tamil Nadu state, in eastern South India. It is the home of Kaliveli Bird Sanctuary.

Kaluveli, also spelled Kazhuveli, is the second largest brackish water lake in South India located in Tindivanam taluk of Villupuram district of the state of Tamil Nadu. It is about 18 km north of Pondicherry.

Ganapathichettikulam is a fishing hamlet, along with Periyakalapet, Chinnakalapet and Pillaichavad, next to Kalapet near Pondicherry on the south eastern coast of India. It is a ward in the municipality of Oulgaret.
Kalapet, or Kalapettai, is a town and enclave in the Union territory of Puducherry, India. It was annexed by the French in 1703 and has been a part of the Union territory ever since.
Murukeri is located in Viluppuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is a small village in Tindivanam town, but a famous one around neighbouring villages.

Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Puducherry or locally known as JNV Kalapet is a boarding, co-educational school in Puducherry district of Puducherry U.T. in India. Navodaya Vidyalayas are funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development and administered by Navodaya Vidyalaya Smiti, an autonomous body under the ministry.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (102 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (115 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kazhuveli Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kaliveli Lake, Kaluveli, Ganapathichettikulam, Kalapet, Murukeri.
